title: Oreogrammitis subreticulata
taxonomy: Oreogrammitis subreticulata is classified as a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and belongs to the genus Oreogrammitis. Further, it is categorized under the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. Within the Polypodiaceae family, Oreogrammitis subreticulata shares its classification with several other species of ferns. The precise taxonomic classification of Oreogrammitis subreticulata is still subject to ongoing research and updates in the field of botany.

This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage.
